vertz.title: Vertz — The LLM-First Web Framework
vertz.description: Vertz is a full-stack TypeScript framework designed for AI-assisted development. Build reactive UIs with zero boilerplate using signals, computed values, and a compiler that does the work for you.

scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler deploy --define DEPLOY_VERSION:"'$(date +%s)'" && bun run scripts/pre-warm.ts
